features.name: unpacked array register with single element
features.description: Code should include an unpacked array register declaration with exactly one element, accessed via index

features.name: array element read after state write in same cycle
features.description: Code should include a pattern where an array element is read immediately after the same state is written in the same always_ff block

features.name: packed array of registers as state element
features.description: Code should include a register array used as state element accessed via hw.array_get pattern after state_write
